displayTitle: Star Wars (2013) #02: In the Shadow of Yavin, Part Two
synopsis: A cagey young Imperial officer seems to anticipate the Rebels' every move, so Princess Leia forms a "stealth squadron" (including Luke Skywalker) to expose a suspected spy within their ranks. Meanwhile, Han Solo and Chewbacca run afoul of bounty hunter Boba Fett, and the Emperor sends Darth Vader on a secret mission! Stars Han Solo, Princess Leia, Luke Skywalker, and Darth Vader! Set during classic trilogy events!
title: Star Wars (2013) #02: In the Shadow of Yavin, Part Two
